head.title: Music for the occasion.
head.intro: Christa provides live music for weddings, funerals, and private celebrations, as a soprano, harpist, or organist, alone or with a small ensemble.

paragraphs.text: Music shapes a wedding as much as anything in the room, and it rewards the same care given to the flowers and the dress. Christa sings the nuptial Mass, plays the harp through the cocktail hour, and works with couples and planners to choose the repertoire, sacred or classical, traditional or contemporary, and to fit each piece to the rhythm of the liturgy and the reception.

sections.alt: Christa Dalmazio playing the harp at an event

offers.heading: Ceremonies
offers.text: Prelude, processional, the sacred moments of a Catholic or Christian wedding, and the recessional, for voice, harp, or organ.

offers.heading: Receptions & events
offers.text: Cocktail hours, dinners, anniversaries, and private gatherings, solo or with ensemble.

offers.heading: Funerals & memorials
offers.text: Cantor and instrumental music for funeral Masses and memorial services, with care and discretion.
